⦗OSS CAD Suite⦘ (venv-church) sipantichijk@penguin:~/church-machine/hardware/soc_combined$ # Check Sapphire SoC instruction BRAM init data (look for ramA)
grep -A3 "ramA.*INIT_0\|INIT_0.*ramA" \
  ~/church-machine/hardware/soc_combined/outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v | head -20

# Broader check: any non-zero INIT in a sapphire-related BRAM
grep "system_ramA\|ramA" \
  ~/church-machine/hardware/soc_combined/outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v | head -10

# Check efx_map log for $readmemb processing
grep -i "readmem\|symbol\|bin\|warning\|error\|cannot" \
  ~/church-machine/hardware/soc_combined/work_syn/efx_map.log | head -20
